prose: Fukui reactivity indices for nitrobenzene computed at the DFT level using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF, tier 'standard', density-fit RI), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied .xyz, not re-optimized (single-point Fukui). Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). N±1 states: cation charge +1 mult 2, anion charge −1 mult 2. SCF converged; integrity.trustworthy = true; sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000. No warnings reported. Headline value is the highest f+ (most electrophilic atom): atom 4 (C, ipso carbon bonded to –NO₂), f+ = 0.49641783. Most nucleophilic atom: atom 5 (C, ortho), f− = 0.10728820. Method: DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP via PySCF chemkit backend. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard nitrobenzene.xyz.
